title: Lakera Guard Response
description: Response payload from the Lakera Guard /v2/guard screening endpoint.

flagged.description: True if any active detector tripped under the resolved policy.

breakdown.description: Per-detector results when `breakdown` was true in the request.

detector_type.description: Detector category (prompt_attack, pii, content_moderation, unknown_links, custom).

payload.description: Match locations for PII and profanity when `payload` was true.

request_uuid.description: Unique identifier for the screening request.
